task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the Avare aviation app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Avare application interface is visible on the screen, showing a map or main menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent simulated the aircraft's position at the specified coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map shows the aircraft's current position icon (usually an airplane symbol) located near the San Mateo Bridge over the San Francisco Bay (approximate coordinates 37.55 N, 122.30 W).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searches for or accesses a list of the nearest airports.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Nearest' menu, airport search dialog, or a list of nearby aviation facilities is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent identifies and selects the correct nearest airport (KSQL).
task_completion.visual_evidence: KSQL (San Carlos Airport) is tapped, highlighted, or selected from a list or directly on the map.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully initiates navigation to the nearest airport.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active navigation route (typically a prominent magenta or colored line) is drawn from the aircraft's current position to KSQL, or a 'Direct To' (D with an arrow) confirmation screen for KSQL is visible.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the app's graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent tapping through the Avare app menus and map, rather than just editing the com.ds.avare_preferences.xml file via a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually activated the navigation feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app must show an active route line or navigation mode engaged, not just the user typing 'KSQL' into a search bar without executing the 'Direct To' or 'Navigate' command.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent dynamically found the airport.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the map or 'Nearest' function to find KSQL, rather than loading a pre-existing flight plan file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target simulated position is 37.55°N, -122.30°W, which is located in the San Francisco Bay near the San Mateo Bridge. The nearest airport to this specific location is San Carlos Airport, which has the official ICAO code KSQL. The agent is expected to use the Avare app (com.ds.avare) to simulate this location and route to KSQL.
